description_long: This fence consists of two parallel rectangular sections, each featuring a horizontal top rail supported by two vertical posts at the ends. Below each rail is a deep, box-like panel that forms the main body of the fence section, giving it a solid and substantial appearance. The structure appears to be made of dark, possibly metal or wood materials, with a uniform, matte finish. The top rails are flat and unadorned, and the posts are simple, lacking any decorative caps or embellishments. The overall design is utilitarian and modern, suitable for urban environments where privacy or separation is needed without ornate detailing. The fence sections are identical and likely modular, allowing for flexible installation in various settings.
description: A pair of modern, boxy fence sections with flat top rails and deep rectangular panels, finished in a dark, matte material. The design is simple and functional, with no decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing both identical fence sections with flat top rails and deep rectangular panels.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the box-like panels and the thickness of the posts and rails.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, displaying the flat rails and rectangular panels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the depth and solid construction of the panels.
